creator: dclarke@blastwave.org
text:
(In reply to commit-hook from comment #3)

Thank you so much Sir !  This was blocking my ability to get LXDE ( and
other stuff ) built for my local Lenovo laptop. I like to use the poudriere
magic and I have a local pkg build server. So anyways ... yes! Thank you!

I will give the poudriere process a go and then report back. Real soon.

Sadly the pkg server is tied up at the moment with rust etc. 

Dennis Clarke
